description: Instrumental variables, difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, and treatment effect tests

tests.prompt: Estimate the effect of education on wages using parents' education as an instrument
tests.dataset_context: wage dataset: wage, education, experience, parents_edu, ability_proxy

tests.prompt: Run 2SLS to address the endogeneity of police spending on crime rates
tests.dataset_context: crime dataset: crime_rate, police_spending, population, instrument1, instrument2

tests.prompt: Check if my instruments are strong enough - compute the first-stage F-statistic
tests.dataset_context: iv_data: endog_var, exog_var, instrument1, instrument2, instrument3

tests.prompt: Estimate the causal effect of the policy using difference-in-differences
tests.dataset_context: policy dataset: outcome, treated, post_treatment, controls

tests.prompt: Compare treatment and control groups before and after the intervention
tests.dataset_context: experiment dataset: y, treatment_group, after_treatment, x1, x2

tests.prompt: Estimate the average treatment effect using propensity score weighting
tests.dataset_context: observational dataset: outcome, treatment, covariate1, covariate2, covariate3

tests.prompt: Use doubly robust estimation for the treatment effect
tests.dataset_context: treatment dataset: y, d, x1, x2, x3

tests.prompt: Estimate the effect of scholarship eligibility at the test score cutoff
Run a fuzzy RD where treatment take-up jumps at the threshold but isn't deterministic
Decompose the treatment effect into direct and mediated components
tests.dataset_context: mediation dataset: outcome, treatment, mediator, covariates

tests.prompt: Construct a synthetic control for California's tobacco program evaluation
tests.dataset_context: state_panel dataset: state, year, cigarette_sales, income, beer_tax
